common.comingSoonDesc: Personal insurance products are launching soon. Stay tuned for car, health, home, and pet insurance.

landing.heroTitle:
Top insurers.
Best prices.
One app.
landing.heroSubtitle: Compare and buy insurance from leading insurers in the UAE — car, health, home, business, and more.
landing.statsTitle: Trusted by businesses across the UAE
landing.ctaSubtitle: Get a personalised quote in under 3 minutes
landing.ctaDescription: We're here for you every step of the way to help you find your ideal insurance plan. Whether you're getting insurance or filing claims, Shory is with you to meet your personal and business insurance requirements. You can use our website and app to explore personal insurance options or drop us an email at corporate@shory.com for corporate insurance and we'll get in touch with you.

start.title: How would you like to start?
start.subtitle: Get insured in under 3 minutes
start.aiAdvisorDesc: Describe your business in plain English — AI handles the rest
start.preConfiguredDesc: Choose from 10 UAE business types — instant quote, no forms
start.uploadLicenceDesc: AI reads your document and pre-fills everything

businessType.title: What type of business?
businessType.subtitle: Select your business type to see recommended coverage
businessType.notListed: My business type isn't listed — fill in manually
businessType.specialistRequired: requires specialist underwriting. We will connect you with a dedicated advisor.
businessType.specialistContactMsg: Our specialist team will contact you within 1 business day.
businessType.specialistLeaveDetails: businesses require specialist underwriting. Leave your details and we will get back to you.

ai.title: AI Advisor
ai.openingMessage: Hi! I'm your Shory insurance advisor. Tell me about your business and I'll help find the right coverage for you. You can describe your business activity, number of employees, and location.
ai.unavailable: AI advisor is temporarily unavailable. You can still get your quote using one of these options:
ai.inputPlaceholder: Describe your business in plain English...
ai.theseRightSeeQuotes: These look right — see my quotes
ai.askEmployees: How many people work in your business (including yourself)?
ai.askRevenue: What's your estimated annual revenue for the next 12 months?
ai.askEmirate: Which emirate is your business based in?
ai.summaryReady: I've prepared personalised quotes based on your profile.
ai.quickQuestions: Let me ask a few quick questions to personalise your quote.
ai.coverKeyRisks: These cover the key risks for your type of business.
ai.needMore: Could you tell me a bit more? For example, what products or services does your business offer?
ai.defaultRecommend: Based on your description, I'd recommend a
ai.defaultCover: These cover the most common risks for businesses like yours.

upload.title: Upload trade licence
upload.subtitleUpload: We'll read your document and extract your business info automatically
upload.subtitleReview: Check the details below — tap any field to edit
upload.subtitleDetails: Almost there — we need a couple more things to generate your quotes
upload.fileHint: PDF, PNG, or JPG — max 10 MB
upload.stepRead: AI reads your trade licence details
upload.stepReview: You review and confirm the extracted info
upload.revenueHelper: Used to calculate your Business Interruption and Liability limits

manual.step1Subtitle: Describe what you do and we'll find the right cover
manual.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Café serving coffee and light meals in Dubai Marina
manual.classificationError: We need a bit more detail. Can you describe what your business actually does?
manual.revenueHelper: Used to calculate your Business Interruption and Liability limits
manual.highValueAssetsDesc: Total estimated value of high-value assets (equipment, machinery, stock, etc.)

results.title: Your Quotes
results.pricingDisclaimer: All prices shown are indicative and subject to final underwriting review.

companyDetails.subtitle: Required by the insurer to issue your policy

companyDetails.manualDesc: We'll verify with UAE government database
companyDetails.skipForNow: Skip for now — I'll provide these later
